title: pimelea axiflora
intro: Pimelea axiflora, also known as needle flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and is a member of the Thymelaeaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Pimelea axiflora can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
